steps.title: Identify the key indicator of difficulty
steps.content: The word “painstakingly” is the decisive clue. It signals that the process involved careful, difficult, and effortful work. The passage also notes they spent three years on the project and “repeatedly had to invent entirely new methods and tools,” all describing a labor-intensive, challenging undertaking.

steps.title: Match the meaning to the correct choice
steps.content: ”Arduous” describes work that is difficult and demanding—exactly what “painstakingly” conveys. The others contradict this: “haphazard” suggests randomness, “contentious” introduces conflict, and “ineffectual” suggests failure where the passage shows success. That matches choice D — D is correct.
